title: Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
company: Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Bengaluru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions:
Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Equitas Small Finance Bank Ventures Solutions!
